# Studio Young Designs — Bespoke Interiors & Manufacturing Atelier

> Established in 1981 in Bangalore, Karnataka, India. Over 40 years of precision craftsmanship, bespoke residential interior design, modular kitchens, custom wardrobes, and turnkey execution.

## Core Services & Disciplines

- **Modular Kitchens**: Engineered for ergonomics and Indian cooking habits. Built with HDMR and BWP marine plywood, Blum soft-close hardware, acrylic, lacquered, and natural veneer finishes.
- **Custom Wardrobes**: Bespoke walk-in closets, sliding floor-to-ceiling wardrobe systems, fluted glass, profile LED illumination, and Italian leather drawer organizers.
- **Living Spaces**: Integrated TV units, acoustic sound-dampening wall panelling, suspended marble credenzas, custom seating, and marble-inlaid coffee tables.
- **Turnkey Residential Interiors**: End-to-end interior design and site execution, including false ceilings, ambient lighting blueprints, electrical/plumbing coordination, custom carpentry, and lifetime post-handover support.

## Founders & Leadership

- **Dhanesh Samant** (Founder): Founded Studio Young Designs in 1981, pioneering handcrafted bespoke residential interiors and state-of-the-art joinery for over four decades.
- **Geeta Samant** (Co-Founder): Directs strategic management, client leadership, and operations, building the studio into one of Bangalore's most respected interior design ateliers.

## Studio Location & Operating Hours

- **Experience Atelier**: No.105, Parvathi Plaza, Richmond Rd, Richmond Town, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560025, India

- **Website**: https://studioyoungdesigns.com

## Key Statistics

- 40+ Years of Craftsmanship (Founded 1981)
- 700+ Completed Residential & Commercial Projects across Bangalore
- 35+ Master Craftsmen & Artisans in our in-house manufacturing workshop
